info.name: Open WebUI
info.summary: AI chat interface with built-in Ollama LLM inference
info.description:
Open WebUI with Ollama for Nextcloud
A complete AI chat solution bundled as a single Nextcloud ExApp. Includes Open WebUI (chat interface) and Ollama (LLM inference engine) in one container.
**Features:** - Beautiful, intuitive chat interface - Built-in Ollama for local LLM inference (no separate installation needed) - Automatic model pulling on first start - Conversation history and organization - Document upload for RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation) - Model switching during conversations - Ollama API accessible for other apps (e.g., n8n workflows) - Mobile-friendly responsive design
**Built-in Models:** - Configure OLLAMA_DEFAULT_MODEL to auto-pull a model on first start - Supports all Ollama-compatible models (Llama, Mistral, Gemma, etc.) - Download additional models through the Open WebUI interface
**Ollama API:** - Other ExApps (like n8n) can access the Ollama API via the proxy - Endpoint: /ollama/api/... (e.g., /ollama/api/generate, /ollama/api/chat)
This ExApp runs Open WebUI + Ollama as a sidecar container managed by Nextcloud's AppAPI.
info.author: Conduction

variable.name: OLLAMA_DEFAULT_MODEL
variable.description: Model to auto-pull on first start (e.g., llama3.2:1b, mistral:7b). Leave empty to skip.

variable.name: OLLAMA_KEEP_ALIVE
variable.description: How long to keep models loaded in memory (default: 5m, e.g., 15m, 1h)

variable.name: OLLAMA_MAX_LOADED_MODELS
variable.description: Maximum number of models to keep loaded simultaneously

variable.name: OLLAMA_FLASH_ATTENTION
variable.description: Enable flash attention for better performance (true/false)

variable.name: OPENAI_API_BASE_URL
variable.description: Optional: URL to additional OpenAI-compatible API (e.g., TGI, vLLM)

variable.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
variable.description: Optional: API key for OpenAI-compatible endpoint

variable.name: ENABLE_SIGNUP
variable.description: Allow new user registration (default: false - use Nextcloud auth)
